42_29: Va az nisonahoi qudrati U ofarinisi osmonhovu zamin va parokandani cunʙandagon dar on dust. Va har goh ʙixohad, ʙar cam' ovardanason tavonost
42_30: Agar sumoro musiʙate rasad, ʙa xotiri korhoest, ki kardaed. Va Xudo ʙisjore az gunohonro afv mekunad
42_31: Sumo natavoned dar rui zamin az U ʙigurezed va sumoro ƣajri U korsozu jovare nest
42_32: Az nisonahoi qudrati U kistihoest cun kuh ki dar darjoho ravonand
42_33: Agar ʙixohad, ʙodro nigah medorad, to kistiho ʙar rui darjo az raftan ʙozmonand. Alʙatta dar in ʙaroi saʙrkunandagoni sukrguzor iʙrathoest
42_34: Jo onhoro ʙa xotiri amalhojason ƣark mekunad va ʙisjorero niz meʙaxsojad
42_35: Va to ʙidonand, kasone, ki dar ojoti Mo cidol mekunand. Ononro hec gurezgohe nest
42_36: On ci sumoro dodaand, ʙahrai in zindagii dunjavist. Va on ci dar nazdi Xudost, ʙaroi onho, ki imon ovardaand va ʙa Parvardigorason tavakkal mekunand, ʙehtaru pojandatar ast
42_37: Va on kasone, ki az gunohoni ʙuzurg va zistiho parhez mekunand va cun dar xasm savand, xatohoro meʙaxsojand
42_38: va onon, ki da'vati Parvardigorasonro qaʙul mekunand va namoz meguzorand va korason ʙar pojai masvarat ʙo jakdigar ast va az on ci ʙa onho ruzi dodaem, sadaqa mekunand
42_39: va onon, ki cun sitame ʙa onho rasad, intiqom megirand
42_40: Cazoi har ʙadi ʙadiest monandi on. Pas kase, ki afv kunad va osti kunad, muzdas ʙo Xudost, zero U sitamkoronro dust nadorad
42_41: Bar kasone, ki pas az zulme, ki ʙar onho rafta ʙosad, intiqom megirand, malomate nest
42_42: Malomat ʙar kasonest, ki ʙa mardum zulm mekunand va ʙa nohaq dar rui zamin sarkasi mekunand. Baroi onhost azoʙe dardovar
42_43: Va on ki saʙr kunad va az xato darguzarad, in az korhoi pisandida ast
42_44: Har kasro, ki Xudo gumroh kunad, az on pas hec duste naxohad dost. Va zolimonro meʙini, ki cun azoʙro ʙingarand, megujand: «Ojo moro rohi ʙozgaste hast?»
42_45: Onhoro meʙini, ki ʙa cahannam meʙarand. Tarsonu xor az gusai casm nigohe duzdida mekunand. Kasone, ki imon ovarda ʙudand, megujand: «Inho xud va kasonasonro dar ruzi qijomat ʙarʙod dodand». Ogoh ʙos, ki sitamkoron dar azoʙi doim xohand ʙud
42_46: Ƣajri Xudo joru madadgore nadorand va har kasro, ki Xudo gumroh kunad, hec rohe ʙarojas nest
42_47: Pes az on ki ruze ʙijojad, ki az coniʙi Xudo ʙozgaste nadorad, ʙa Parvardigoraton cavoʙi qaʙul dihed. Dar on ruz na panohe xohed dost va na kase az sumo muhofizat tavonad kard
42_48: Agar ruj gardonand, turo nafiristodaem, ki nigahʙonason ʙosi. Bar tu ƣajri rasonidani pajƣom hec nest. Va Mo cun ʙa inson az rahmati Xud ʙicasonem, sodmon megardad va agar ʙa xotiri korhoe, ki kardaast, noravoi ʙa u rasad, nosiposi mekunad
42_49: Az oni Xudost farmonravoii osmonhovu zamin. Har ci ʙixohad, meofarinad. Ba har ki ʙixohad, duxtar meʙaxsad va ʙa har ki ʙixohad, pisar meʙaxsad
42_50: Va jo ham pisar dihad va ham duxtar. Va har kasro ʙixohad, aqim (nozo) megardonad, zero U donovu tavonost
42_51: Hec ʙasarero narasad, ki Xudo cuz ʙa vahj jo az on sui parda ʙo u suxan gujad. Jo faristae mefiristad to ʙa farmoni U har ci ʙixohad, ʙa u vahj kunad. U ʙalandpojavu hakim ast
42_52: Hamcunin kalomi Xudro ʙa farmoni Xud ʙa tu vahj kardem. Tu namedonisti kitoʙu imon cist. Vale Mo onro nure soxtem to har jak az ʙandagonamonro, ki ʙixohem, ʙa on hidojat kunem va tu ʙa rohi rost roh nison medihi
42_53: rohi on Xudoe, ki az oni Ust har ci dar osmonhovu zamin ast. Ogoh ʙosed, ki hamai korho ʙa Xudo ʙozmegardad
43_3: Mo in kitoʙro Qur'one araʙi qaror dodem, ʙosad, ki ʙa aql darjoʙed
43_4: Va on dar ummulkitoʙ ast dar nazdi Mo: kitoʙe arcmandu hikmatomez
43_5: Ojo ʙa on saʙaʙ, ki mardume az had guzasta hasted, az sumo ruj gardonem va Qur'onro az sumo dareƣ dorem
43_6: Ba mijoni pesinijon pajomʙaroni ʙisjore firistodem
43_7: Va hec pajomʙare ʙar onho firistoda namesud, ki masxaraas nakarda ʙosand
43_8: Onhoro, ki az onho ʙoquvvattar ʙudand, halok kardem. Va dostoni pesinijon guzast
43_9: Agar az onho ʙipursi: «Ci kase osmonhovu zaminro ofaridaast?» Megujand: «Onhoro on ƣoliʙi dono ofaridaast!»
43_10: On ki zaminro ʙisoti sumo soxt va ʙarojaton rohho dar on padid ovard, ʙosad, ki hidojat saved
43_11: Va on ki az osmon oʙ firistod ʙa miqdor. Va ʙa on sarzamini murdaro zinda kardem. Sumo niz incunin az gurho ʙerun ovarda saved
43_12: va on ki hamai cufthoro ʙijofarid. Va ʙarojaton az kistiho va corpojon markaʙho soxt, ki savor saved
43_13: Va cun ʙar pusti onho qaror girifted, ne'mati Parvardigoratonro jod kuned va ʙigued: «Pok ast on kas, ki inhoro romi mo kard, vagarna moro tavoni on naʙud
43_14: Va mo ʙa sui Parvardigoramon ʙozmegardem»
43_15: Va ʙaron U az mijoni ʙandagonas farzande qoil sudand. Odami ʙa oskoro nosipos (nosukr) ast
43_16: Ojo U az mijoni maxluqonas ʙaroi Xud duxtaron ʙargirifta va pisaronro xosi sumo kardaast
43_17: Va cun ʙa jake az onho muƶdai tavalludi hamon cizero dihand, ki ʙa Xudoi rahmon nisʙat doda, rujas sijoh gardad va pur az xasm savad
43_18: Ojo on ki ʙa orois parvaris jofta (ja'ne duxtar) va dar hangomi cidol oskor namegardad, az oni Xudost
43_19: Va faristagonro, ki ʙandagoni Xudojand, zan pindostand. Ojo ʙa hangomi ofarinisason on co hozir ʙudaand? Ba zudi in sohidiasonro menavisand va az onho ʙozxost mesavad
43_20: Guftand: «Agar Xudoi rahmon mexost, mo faristagonro nameparastidem». On ci megujand, az rui nodonist va ƣajri ʙa duruƣ suxan namegujand
43_21: Ojo pes az Qur'on kitoʙe ʙarojason nozil kardaem, ki aknun ʙa on cang mezanand? (pajravi mekunand)
43_22: Na, megujand: «Padaronamonro ʙar dine joftem va mo az pai onho meravem»
43_23: Va on tavr pes az tu ʙa kadom dehae ʙimdihandae firistodem, mutana'imonas (sohiʙne'matonas) guftand: «Padaronamonro ʙar dine joftem va mo ʙa amalhoi onho iqtido (panravi) mekunem»
43_24: Guft: «Hatto agar ʙaroi sumo cize ʙijovaram, ki az on ci padaronatonro ʙar on jofta ʙuded, hidojatkunandatar ʙosad?» Guftand: «Mo ʙa dine, ki sumoro ʙa on firistodaand, ʙeimonem»
43_25: Pas az onho intiqom giriftem. Va ʙingar, ki oqiʙati duruƣʙarorandagon ci guna ʙudaast
43_26: Va Iʙrohim ʙa padaru qavmas guft: «Man az on ci sumo meparasted, ʙezoram
43_27: ƣajri on ki maro ofarida, ki U rohnamoijam xohad kard»
43_28: Va in suxanro dar farzandoni xud suxane pojanda kard, ʙosad, ki ʙa Xudo ʙozgardand
43_29: Va Man inhovu padaronasonro az zindagi ʙahramand kardam, to on goh ki haq va pajomʙare ravsangar ʙa sujason omad
43_30: Cun haq ʙar onho oskor sud, guftand: «In codust va mo ʙa on imon nameovarem»
43_31: Guftand: «Caro in Qur'on ʙar marde az ʙuzurgmardoni on du deha nozil nasudaast?»
43_32: Ojo onon rahmati Parvardigoratro taqsim mekunand? Xol on ki mo ruzii onhoro dar in zindagii dunjo mijonason taqsim mekunem. Va ʙa'zero ʙa martaʙa ʙolotar az ʙa'ze digar qaror dodaem, to ʙa'ze ʙa'zi digarro ʙa xidmat girand. Va rahmati Parvardigorat az on ci onho cam' meovarand, ʙehtar ast
43_33: Va agar na on ʙud, ki hamai mardum jak ummat namesudand, saqfhoi xonahoi kasonero, ki Xudoi rahmonro ʙovar nadorand, az nuqra mekardem va ʙar onho nardʙonhoe, menihodem, to ʙar on ʙolo ravand
43_34: Va ʙaroi xonahojason niz darhoe az nuqra mekardem va taxthoe, ki ʙar onho takja zanand
43_35: va az har guna zinat. Va hamai inho ʙahramandii nocizi dunjavist, hol on ki oxirat dar nazdi Parvardigori tu ʙaroi parhezgoron ast
43_36: Har kas, ki az jodi Xudoi rahmon ruj gardonad, sajtone ʙar u oʙasta mekunem,, ki hameosa hamrohas ʙosad
43_37: Va on sajtonho ononro az rohi Xudo ʙozmegardonand, vale pindorand, ki hidojatjoftagonand
43_38: To on goh ki nazdi Mo ojad, megujad: «Ej kos, durii manu tu (misli) durii masriqu maƣriʙ ʙud. Va tu ci hamrohi ʙade ʙudi»
43_39: Cun sitam karded, on ruz pusajmoni foida nakunad va har du dar azoʙ sarik ʙosed
43_40: Ojo tu mexohi ʙa karon suxan ʙisunavoni jo kuron va onhoero, ki dar gumrohii oskor hastand, roh nison dihi
43_41: Va agar turo ʙiʙarem, az onho intiqom megirem
43_42: Jo on azoʙero, ki ʙa onho va'da dodaem, ʙa tu nison medihem, ki Mo ʙar onho tavono hastem
43_43: Pas dar on ci ʙa tu vahj sudaast, cang ʙizan, (pajravi kun), ki tu ʙar rohi rost hasti
43_44: Va Qur'on saʙaʙi ʙalandovoza gastani tu va qavmi tust va ʙa zudi ʙozxost saved
43_45: Az pajomʙaroni Mo, ki pes az tu firistodaem, ʙipurs: «Ojo ƣajri Xudoi rahmon digarero ʙaroi parastisi onho qaror doda ʙudem?»
43_46: Va alʙatta Musoro hamroh ʙo ojoti Xud ʙar Fir'avn va raisoni qavmas firistodem va guft: «Man firistodai Parvardigori cahonijonam!»
43_47: Cun ojoti Moro ʙar onon arza dost, ʙa nogoh hama az on ʙa xanda aftodand
43_48: Va har mu'cizae, ki ʙa onho nison dodem, az mu'cizai digar azimtar ʙud. On goh hamaro ʙa azoʙ giriftor kardem, ʙosad, ki ʙozgardand
43_49: Guftand: «Ej codugar, Parvardigoratro ʙo on nomhoe, ki ʙo tu vahj kardaast, ʙarom mo ʙixon, ki mo hidojatsudagonem»
43_50: Cun azoʙro az onho ʙardostem, pajmoni xudro sikastand
43_51: Fir'avn dar mijoni mardumas nido dod, ki ej qavmi man, ojo podsohii Misru in cujʙoron, ki az zeri poi man cori hastand, az oni man nestand? Ojo nameʙined
43_52: Ojo man ʙehtaram jo in mardi xori zalil, ki durust suxan guftan natavonad
43_53: Caro dasthojasro ʙa dastʙandhoi tillo najorostaand? Va caro guruhe az faristagon hamrohas najomadaand
43_54: Pas Fir'avn qavmi xudro gumroh soxt, to ʙa u ito'at kardand, ki mardume taʙah kor ʙudand
43_55: Cun Moro ʙa xasm ovardand, az onho intiqom giriftem va hamagonro ƣarq soxtem
43_56: Ononro dar sumori guzastagon va doston ʙaroi ojandagon kardem
43_57: Va cun dostoni pisari Marjam ovarda sud, qavmi tu ʙa sodmoni farjod zadand
43_58: va guftan, d: «Ojo xudojoni mo ʙehtarand jo U?» Va in suxanro faqat ʙaroi cidol ʙo tu guftaand, ki mardume xusumat kunandaand
43_59: U faqat ʙandae ʙud, ki Mo ne'matas ato kardem va mojai iʙrati ʙani- Isroilas gardonidem
43_60: Agar mexostem, ʙa coi sumo faristagone padid meovardem, to dar rui zamin conisini sumo gardand
43_61: Va ʙesuʙha u (Iso) nisonai faro rasidani qijomat ast. Dar in sak makuned va ʙa Man pajravi kuned! In ast rohi rost
43_62: Sajton sumoro az roh ʙoznagardonad, zero u dusmani oskori sumost
43_63: Va cun Iso ʙo dalelhoi ravsani xud omad, guft: «Barojaton hikmat ovardaam va omadaam, to cizhoero, ki dar on ixtilof mekuned, ʙajon kunam. Pas az Xudo ʙitarsed va ʙa man ito'at kuned
43_64: Xudoi jakto Parvardigori manu Parvardigori sumost. Uro ʙiparasted. Rohi rost in ast»
43_65: Guruhho ʙo ham ixtilof kardand. Pas voj ʙar sitamkoron az azoʙi dardovari qijomat
43_66: Ojo casm ʙa rohi cize cuz qijomatand, ki nogoh va ʙexaʙar ʙar onho ʙijojad
43_67: Dar on ruz duston, — ƣajr az parhezgoron, — dusmani jakdigarand
43_68: Ej ʙandagoni Man, dar on ruz ʙime ʙar sumo nest va sumo ƣamgin namesaved
43_69: On kason, ki ʙa ojoti Mo imon ovardaand va taslimi amri Mo sudaand
43_70: sumo va cufthojaton ʙo sodkomi ʙa ʙihist doxil saved
43_71: Qadahhoi zarrin va kuzahoro dar mijonason ʙa gardis meovarand. Dar on cost har ci nafs orzu kunad va dida az on lazzat ʙiʙarad. Va dar on co covidona xohed ʙud
43_72: In ʙihistest, ki ʙa ivazi korhoe, ki kardaed, ʙa merosas meʙared
43_73: Dar on co ʙarojaton mevahoi ʙisjor hast, ki az onho mexured
43_75: Azoʙason kam namesavad va onho az noumedi xomus ʙosand
43_76: Mo ʙa onho zulme nakardaem, onho xud ʙa xudason sitam kardaand
43_77: Farjod ʙarovarand, ki ej moliki duzax kos Parvardigori tu moro ʙimironad. Megujad: «Na, sumo dar in co mondani hasted»
43_78: Mo sumoro ʙo haq osno kardem, vale ʙestaraton haqro ʙad dided
43_79: Ojo onho dar e'tiqodi xud poj fisurdaand? Mo ham poj fisurdaem
43_80: Ojo mepindorand, Mo rozu nacvo (suxanoni pinhoniasonro) namesunavem? Ore, rasuloni Mo nazdi onho hastand va menavisand
43_81: Bigu: «Agar Xudoi rahmonro farzande meʙud, man az naxustin parastandagon meʙudam
43_82: Pok ast Parvardigori osmonhovu zamin va Parvardigori ars az on nisʙatho, ki ʙa U medihend
43_83: Pas ʙiguzorason, to ʙa hamon suxanoni ʙotil masƣul ʙosand va ʙa ʙozica sargarm, to on ruze, ki onhoro va'da dodaand, ʙirasad
43_84: Ust, ki ham dar osmon Xudost va ham dar zamin Xudost va hakimu donost
43_85: Bartaru ʙuzurgvortar ast on kas, ki farmonravoii osmonhovu zamin va har ci dar mijoni onhost, az oni Ust va ilmi faro rasidani qijomat xosi Ust va ʙa U ʙozgardonida mesaved
43_86: Kasone ƣajri Uro, ki ʙa xudoi mexonand, qodir ʙa safo'ati kase nestand. Ƣajri kasone, ki az rui ilm ʙa haq sohidi doda ʙosand
43_87: Agar az onho ʙipursi, ki ci kase onhoro ofaridaast, megujand: «Olloh». Pas caro az haq ruj megardonand
43_88: Guftori pajjomʙar in ʙud: «Ej Parvardigori man, inho mardume hastand, ki imon nameovarand
43_89: Pas, az onho darguzar va ʙigu: «Salomat ʙosed!» Ore, ʙa zudi xohand donist
44_3: Mo onro dar saʙi muʙorake nozil kardem. Mo ʙimdihanda ʙudaem
44_4: Dar on saʙ har farmone muvofiqi hikmat sodir mesavad
44_5: farmone az coniʙi Mo. Va firistandai on ʙudaem
44_6: Rahmatest az coniʙi Parvardigorat va alʙatta Ust sunavovu dono
44_7: Parvardigori osmonhovu zamin va on ci mijoni in du ast, agar sumo jaqinkunandaed
44_8: Nest Xudoe ƣajri U. Znnda mekunadu memironad. Parvardigori sumovu Parvardigori padaroni pesini sumost
44_9: Na, onho hamcunon ʙa sakki xud dilxusand
44_10: Pas muntaziri ruze ʙos, ki osmon ʙa oskoro dud ʙijovarad
44_11: Va on dud hamai mardumro dar xud furu girad. Va in azoʙest dardovar
44_12: «Ej Parvardigori mo, in azoʙro az mo dur gardon, ki mo imon ovardaem»
44_13: Kuco pand megirand? Hol on ki cun pajomʙari ravsangar ʙar onho firistoda sud
44_14: az u rujgardon sudand va guftand: «Devonaest ta'limjofta!»
44_15: Azoʙro andake ʙarmedorem va sumo ʙoz ʙa dini xud ʙozmegarded
44_16: Ruze onhoro ʙa savlate (hamlae) saxt furu girem, ki Mo intiqomgirandaem
44_17: Pes az onho qavmi Fir'avnro ozmudem va pajomʙare ʙuzurgvor nazdason omad
44_18: «ki ʙandagoni Xudoro ʙa man taslim kuned, ki man pajomʙare aminam
44_19: Va niz ʙar Xudo sarkasi makuned, ki man ʙo huccate ravsan nazdi sumo omadaam
44_20: Va agar ʙixohed ʙar man sang ʙizaned, man ʙa Parvardigori xud va Parvardigori sumo panoh meʙaram
44_21: va agar ʙa man imon nameovarad, az man kanor gired»
44_22: Pas Parvardigorasro duo kard, ki inho mardume mucrimand (gunahgorand)
44_23: Bandagoni Maro saʙhangom ravona kun, to az pai sumo ʙijojand
44_24: Darjoro orom pusti sar guzor, ki on laskar ƣarqsudagonand
44_25: Ba'd az xud ci ʙoƣhovu casmasorho ʙar coj guzostand
44_27: va ne'mate, ki dar on ƣarqi sodmoni ʙudand
44_28: Hamcunin sud va Mo on ne'mathoro ʙa mardume digar meros guzostem
44_29: Na osmon ʙar onho girist va na zamin va na ʙa onho muhlat doda sud
44_30: Va mo ʙani-Isroilro az on azoʙi xorkunanda xalos kardem
44_31: az azoʙi Fir'avni sarkasi az had guzaranda
44_32: va az rui ilm ʙar ahli cahonason ʙarguzidem
44_33: Va ojote ʙa onho ato kardem, ki dar on imtihone oskor ʙud
44_35: «Pojoni kor cuz hamin margi naxustin nest va mo digar ʙor zinda namesavem
44_36: Va agar rost megued, padaroni moro ʙa cahon ʙozovared»
44_37: Ojo inho ʙehtarand jo qavmi Tuʙʙa' va kasone, ki pes az on qavm ʙudand? Hamaro halok kardem, ki mucrimon (gunahgoron) ʙudand
44_38: Mo in osmonhovu zamin va on ciro mijoni onhost, ʙa ʙozica najofaridaem
44_39: Onhoro ʙa haq ofaridaem, vale ʙestarin namedonand
44_40: Va'dagohi hama dar ruzi dovari qijomat ast
44_41: Ruze, ki hec duste az dusti xud cizero daf' nakunad va az sui kase jori nasavad
44_42: ƣajri kase, ki Xudo ʙar u ʙuʙaxsojad, zero Ust ƣoliʙu mehruʙon
44_45: Monandi misi gudoxta dar sikamho mecusad
44_47: Bigiredas va ʙa saxti ʙa mijoni cahannamas ʙikased
44_48: va ʙar saras oʙi cuson ʙirezed, to sikanca savad
44_50: In hamon cizest, ki dar on sak mekarded
44_53: liʙoshoe az sundusu istaʙraq mepusand va ruʙarui ham mesinand
44_54: Hamcunin hurul'ajnro (huroni faroxcasm) ʙa hamsarijason darovarem
44_55: Dar osoistagi har mevaero, ki ʙixohand, metalaʙand
44_56: Dar on co ta'mi margro namecasand, ƣajri hamon margi avvalin. Va onhoro Xudo az azoʙi cahannam nigoh dostaast
44_57: In ʙaxsisest az coniʙi Parvardigorat va in piruzii ʙuzurgest
44_58: Mo adoi suxani xud ʙar zaʙoni tu oson kardem, ʙosad, ki pand girand
44_59: Tu muntazir ʙos, ki onho niz muntazirand
45_2: Nozil sudani in kitoʙ az coniʙi Xudoi ƣoliʙu hakim ast
45_3: Alʙatta dar osmonhovu zamin nisonahoi iʙratest ʙaroi mu'minon
45_4: Va dar ofarinisi sumo va parokanda sudani cunʙandagon iʙrathost ʙaroi ahli jaqin. (imon)
45_5: Omadusudi saʙu ruz va rizqe, ki Xudo az osmon mefiristad va zamini murdaro ʙa on zinda mekunad va niz dar vazisi ʙodho iʙrathost ʙaroi oqilon
45_6: Inho ojoti Xudost, ki ʙa rosti ʙar tu tilovat mekunem. Ƣajri Xudovu ojotas ʙa kadom suxan imon meovarand
45_8: Ojoti Xudoro, ki ʙar u xonda mesavad, mesunavad. On goh ʙa gardankasi saxt meistad, cunon ki gui hec nasunidaast. Pas ʙa azoʙe dardovaras ʙasorat (xusxaʙar) deh
45_9: Cun cize az ojoti Moro faro girad, ʙa masxaraas megirad, inho sazovori azoʙe xorkunandaand
45_10: Pesi rujason cahannam ast. Va mole, ki ʙa dast ovardaand va kasone, ki ƣajri Xudoi jakto ʙa xudoi giriftaand, ʙa holason foida nakunad. Onhorost azoʙe ʙuzurg
45_11: In rahnamoiest. Va onon, ki ʙa ojoti Parvardigorason imon nameovarand, ʙarojason azoʙest va saxttarin azoʙhoi dardovar
45_12: Xudost, ki darjoro romi sumo kard, to dar on ʙa farmoni U kistiho ravon ʙosand va talaʙi ma'isat kuned, ʙosad, ki sukrguzor ʙosed
45_13: Romi sumo soxt on ci dar osmonhost va on ci dar zamin ast. Hama az oni Ust. Dar in ʙaroi fikrkunandagon iʙrathoest
45_14: Ba kasone, ki imon ovardaand, ʙigu: «Az xatoi kasone, ki ʙa ruzhoi Xudo ʙovar nadorand, darguzared, to xud on mardumro ʙa cazoi amalhoe, ki murtakiʙ sudaand (kardaand), cazo dihad
45_15: Har kas kori soistae kunad, ʙa naf'i xudi ust va har kas murtakiʙi kori ʙade savad, ʙa zijoni ust. Sipas hama ʙa sui Parvardigoraton ʙozgardonda mesaved
45_16: Mo ʙa ʙani-Isroil kitoʙ va ilmi dovarivu pajomʙari ato kardem va az cizhoi pokizavu xus ruzijason kardem. Va ʙar cahonijon ʙartarijason (ʙehtariason) dodem
45_17: Va onhoro dar ʙorai on amr daloile ravsan dodem. Va dar on az rui hasadu kina ixtilof kardand, on goh, ki donis joftand. Xudo dar ruzi qijomat dar on ci ixtilof (ziddijat) mekardand, dovari xohad kard
45_18: Pas turo ʙa rohi din andoxtem. Bo on roh ʙirav va az pai xohisi nodonon marav
45_19: Inho turo hec az azoʙi Xudo daf' namekunand va zolimon dustdoroni jakdigarand va Xudo dustdori parhezgoron ast
45_20: In Qur'on dalelhoi ravsani mardum va hidojatu rahmatest ʙaroi ahli jaqin
45_21: Ojo okon, ki kunandai ʙadiho mesavand, mepindorand, ki dar sumori kasone, ki imon ovardaand va korhoi soista kardaand, qarorason medihem? Va ojo zindagivu margason jakson ast? Ci ʙad dovari mekunand
45_22: Va Xudo osmonhovu zaminro ʙa haq ʙijofarid, to har kasero ʙaroʙari kore, ki kardaast, cazo dihad va ʙa onho sitam nasavad
45_23: Ojo on kasro, ki havasasro cun xudoi xud girift va Xudo az rui ilm gumrohas kard va ʙar gusu dilas muhr nihod va ʙar didagonas parda afkand, didai? Agar Xudo hidojat nakunad, ci kase uro hidojat xohad kard? Caro pand namegired
45_24: Va guftand: «Cuz zindagii dunjavii mo hec nest. Memiremu zinda mesavem va moro ƣajri dahr halok nakunad». Ononro ʙa on donise nest va faqat dar pindore hastand
45_25: Va cun ojoti ravsani Mo ʙar onho tilovat savad, huccatason in ast, ki megujand: «Agar rost megued, padaroni moro zinda kuned»
45_26: Bigu: «Xudost, ki sumoro zinda mekunad, pas memiranad va sipas hamaro dar ruzi qijomat, — ki sake dar on nest, — cam' meovarad. Vale ʙestari mardum namedonand!»
45_27: Az oni Xudovand ast farmonravoii osmonu zamin. Va on ruz, ki qijomat ʙarpo savad, ahli ʙotil zijon xohand kard
45_28: Har ummatero ʙuʙini, ki ʙa zonu daromadaast va har ummatero ʙaroi giriftani nomai a'molas ʙixonand. Dar cunin ruze dar ʙaroʙari amalhoe, ki kardaed, cazo meʙined
45_29: In navistai Most, ki ʙa haq suxan megujad, zero Mo korhoero, ki mekardaed, menavistaem
45_30: Ammo kasonero, ki imon ovardaand va korhoi soista mekunand. Parvardigorason doxil dar rahmati Xud mekunad va in zafari oskor ast
45_31: Ammo, ej onon, ki imon najovardaed, magar ojoti Mo ʙar sumo xonda namesud va sumo takaʙʙur menamuded va mardume gunohkor ʙuded
45_32: Cun gufta mesud, ki va'dai Xudo haq ast va dar qijomat sakke nest, megufted: «Mo namedonem qijomat cist? Faqat andak gumone meʙarem va ʙa jaqin (imoni qavi) narasidaem»
45_33: Amalhoi zistason dar ʙaroʙarason oskor sud va on cize, ki masxaraas mekardand gird ʙar girdasonro ʙigirift
45_34: Ba onho gufta savad: «Imruz faromusaton mekunem, hamcunon, ki sumo didori cunin ruzatonro faromus karda ʙuded. Cojgohaton dar otas ast va sumoro hec jovare nest
45_35: Va, in ʙa cazoi on ast, ki ojoti Xudoro ʙa masxara megirifted va zindagii dunjavi sumoro ʙifireft». Pas imruz az in otas kase ʙerunason naʙarad va kase uzrasonro qaʙul nakunad
45_36: Sitois az oni Xudost — Parvardigori osmonhovu Parvardigori zamin va Parvardigori cahonijon
45_37: Buzurgvori dar osmonhovu zamin xosi Ust va Ust ƣoliʙu hakim
46_2: Nozil sudani in kitoʙ az coniʙi Xudoi ƣoliʙu hakim ast
46_3: Mo osmonhovu zamin va on ciro, ki dar mijoni on dust, ʙa hak, va to muddate mu'ajjan ofaridaem. Va kofiron az on ci onhoro metarsonand, ruj megardonand
46_4: Bigu: «Az onhoe, ki ƣajri Olloh ʙa xudoi mexoned, xaʙar dihed. Ba man nison dihed, ki az in zamin ci cizro ofaridaand? Jo dar xilqati (ofaridani) osmonho sirkatdostaand? Agar rost megued, ʙaroi man kitoʙe, ki pes az in Qur'on omada ʙosad jo agar donise az pesinijon mondaast, ʙijovared
46_5: Va kist gumrohtar az on, ki ʙa coi Olloh cizero ʙa xudoi mexonad, ki to ruzi qijomat ʙa u cavoʙ namedihad, va ʙuton az du'oi ʙutparaston ʙexaʙarand
46_6: Va cun dar qijomat mardumro cam' orand, ʙuton ʙo parastandagoni xud dusman ʙosand va az iʙodatason munkirand
46_7: Cun ojoti Mo ʙa ravsani ʙa onon xonda savad, kofiron haqiqatero, ki ʙarojason nozil sudaast, gujand: «Coduii oskor ast»
46_8: Jo megujand: «In kitoʙ duruƣest, ki xud ʙoftaast!» Bigu: «Agar man onro cun duruƣe ʙa ham ʙofta ʙosam, sumo nametavoned xasmi Xudoro az man ʙozdored. Xudo az on ta'naho, ki ʙa on mezaned, ogohtar ast. Va sohidii U mijoni manu sumo kofist. Va Ust ʙaxsojandavu mehruʙon!»
46_9: Bigu: «Man az mijoni digar pajomʙaron navomada (avvalin) nestam va namedonam, ki ʙar man jo ʙar sumo ci xohad sud. Man ʙa cize ƣajri on ci ʙa man vahj mesavad, pajravi namekunam va man faqat ʙimdihandae oskor hastam»
46_10: Bigu: «Ci mekuned, agar Qur'on az coniʙi Xudo ʙosad va sumo ʙa on imon najovared? Jake az ʙani-Isroil ʙa on sohidi dod va imon ovard. Vale sumo gardankasi mekuned. Xudo mardumi sitamkorro hidojat namekunad!»
46_11: Kofiron mu'minonro guftand: «Agar dar on xajre meʙud, inho az mo pestar qaʙul namekardand». Va cun ʙa on roh najoftand, xohand guft, ki in duruƣe derina ast
46_12: Va pes az on kitoʙi Muso rohnamovu rahmat ʙud. Va in kitoʙest tasdiqkunandai on ʙa zaʙoni araʙi to sitamkoronro ʙime va nekukoronro xusxaʙare ʙosad
46_13: Alʙatta onon, ki guftand, ki Parvardigori mo Olloh ast, va sipas pojdori kardand, ʙime ʙar onho nest va anduhgin namesavand
46_14: Inho ʙa mukofoti amalhojason ahli ʙihistand va dar on co covidonaand
46_15: Odamiro ʙa neki kardan ʙo padaru modari xud suporis kardem. Modaras ʙori uro ʙa dusvori ʙardost va ʙa dusvori ʙar zamin nihod. Va muddati haml to az sir ʙozgiriftanas si moh ast to cun ʙa sinni cavoni rasad va ʙa cihilsolagi darojad, gujad: «Ej Parvardigori man, ʙa man ʙijomuz to sukri ne'mate, ki ʙar man va ʙar padaru modaram ato kardai, ʙa on coj oram. Kore soista ʙikunam, ki Tu az on xusnud savi va farzandoni maro soleh kun. Man ʙa Tu ʙozgastam va az taslimsudagonam»
46_16: Inho kasone hastand, ki korhoi nekasonro mepazirem va az gunohason darmeguzarem. Dar zumrai ahli ʙihistand. Har va'dae, ki ʙa onho doda suda, rost ast
46_17: Va on ki ʙa padaru modaras guft: «Uf ʙar sumo, ojo ʙa man va'da medihed, ki az guram ʙarxezonand va hol on ki mardume pes az man ʙudaand, ki ʙarnaxostaand? Va on du ʙa dargohi Xudo istiƣosa (dodxohi) mekunand va, gujand: «Voj ʙar tu, imon ʙijovar, ki va'dai Xudo haq ast!» Megujad: «Inho cize cuz hamon afsonai pesinijon nest!»
46_18: Dar ʙorai inho hamon suxan, ki dar ʙorai ummathoi pesin az cinnu ins gufta suda ʙud, ʙa haqiqat mepajvandad. Inho zijonkunandagonand
46_19: Va har jakro nisʙat ʙa kore, ki kardaast, daracahost, to Xudo cazoi korhojasonro ʙa tamomi ʙidihad va ʙa on on sitam namesavad
46_20: Va ruze, ki kofironro ʙar otas arza kunand: dar zindagii dunjavi az cizhoi pokiza va xus ʙahramand suded, imruz ʙa azoʙi xori cazojaton medihand. Va in ʙa on saʙaʙ ast, ki dar zamin ʙe hec haqqe takaʙʙuri mekarded va ʙadkori pes girifta ʙuded
46_21: Barodari qavmi Odro ʙa jod ʙijovar, ki cun qavmi xudro dar Ahqof ʙim dod — va pes az u pajomʙarone ʙudand va raftandu pas az u pajomʙarone omadand, — ki ƣajri Xudoi jaktoro naparasted, ki man az azoʙi ruze ʙuzurg ʙar sumo metarsam
46_22: Guftand: «Ojo omadai, to moro az xudojonamon rujgardon sozi? Agar rost megui, har ci ʙa mo va'da dodai, ʙijovar»
46_23: Guft: «Inro Xudo medonad va man on ciro ʙa on firistoda sudaam, ʙa sumo merasonam. Vale meʙinam, ki mardume nodon hasted»
46_24: Cun aʙre didand, ki az coniʙi rudxonahoson meojad, guftand: «In aʙre ʙoronzost». Na in hamon cizest, ki onro ʙa sitoʙ metalaʙided. Bod ast va dar on ʙod azoʙe dardovar
46_25: ʙa farmoni Parvardigoras hama cizro halok mekunad. Cunon sudand, ki aknun faqat xonahojasonro ʙini. Va Mo mucrimonro (gunahgoronro) in tavr cazo medihem
46_26: Va onho cunon tavonu qudrat doda ʙudem, ki ʙa sumo nadidaem. Barojason gusu casmu dil qaror dodem. Vale gusu casmu dilason ʙa holason hec foida nakard, zero ojoti Xudoro inkor mekardand, to on azoʙe, ki ʙa masxaraas megiriftand, onhoro furu srift
46_27: Mo hamai qarijahoero (dehahoero), ki atrofi sumo ʙudaand, halok kardaem va ojotro gunogun ʙajon kardem, sojad, ki ʙozgardand
46_28: Pas caro on xudojone, ki ƣajri Olloh ʙaroi nazdiki ʙa xudoi girifta ʙudand, jorijason nakardand, ʙalki az nazarason gum sudand? Ija ast duruƣu ʙoftahojason
46_29: Va guruhe az cinro nazdi tu ravona kardem, to Qur'onro ʙisnavand. Cun ʙa hazratas (nazdas) rasidand, guftand: «Gus andozed! Cun ʙa pojon omad, monandi ʙimdihandagone nazdi qavmi xud ʙozgastand
46_30: Guftand: «Ej qavmi mo, mo kitoʙe sunidem, ki ʙa'd az Muso nozil suda, kitoʙhoi pesinro tasdiq mekunad va ʙa haq va rohi rost roh menamojad
46_31: Ej qavmi mo, in da'vatkunanda ʙa Xudoro qaʙul kuned va ʙa u imon ʙijovared, to Xudo gunohonatonro ʙiʙaxsojad va sumoro az azoʙe dardovar dar amon dorad
46_32: Va har kase, ki ʙa in da'vatkunanda cavoʙ nagujad, nametavonad, dar rui zamin az Xudo ʙigurezad va uro ƣajri Xudo hec jovare nest va dar gumrohii oskorest!»
46_33: Ojo nameʙinand, ki Xudo jaktost, on ki osmonhovu zaminro ʙijofarid va dar ofaridani onho darnamond. U metavonad murdagonro zinda kunad. Bale, U ʙar har kore tavonost
46_34: Ruze, ki kofiron ʙa otas arza savand... Ojo in haqiqat nest? Gujand: «Bale, ʙa Parvardigoramon savgand!» Gujad: «Ba xotiri on ki kofir ʙuded, inak azoʙro ʙicased!»
46_35: Pas pojdori kun, hamcunon ki pajomʙaroni ululazm (ʙoazm) pojdori karda ʙudand, Va dar uquʙatason sitoʙ makun. On ruz, ki on va'daero, ki ʙa onho doda suda, ʙingarand, pindorand, ki cuz ʙa qadri so'ate az ruz dar gur namonda ʙudand. In rasonidani pajƣom ast. Ojo cuz nofarmonon ʙa halokat merasand
47_1: Xudo amalhoi kasonero, ki kofir sudand va mardumro az rohi Xudo ʙozdostand, ʙotil soxtaast
47_2: Xudo gunohi kasonero, ki imon ovardaand va korhoi soista kardaand va ʙa on ci ʙar Muhammad nozil suda, — ki on haq ast va az coniʙi Parvardigorason, — imon ovardaand, az onho dur kard va korhojasonro ʙa saloh ovard
47_3: Va in ʙa on saʙaʙ ast, ki kofiron ʙa ʙotil pajravi kardand va onon, ki imon ovardand, ʙa haqqe, ki az coniʙi Parvardigorason omada ʙud, pajravi kardaand. Xudo ʙaroi mardum incunin misol meorad
47_4: Cun ʙo kofiron ruʙaru suded, gardanasonro ʙizaned. Va cun onhoro saxt furu kufted, asirason kuned va saxt ʙiʙanded. On goh jo ʙa minnat ozod kumed jo ʙa fidja (ʙa ivazi pul). To on goh, ki cang ʙa pojon ojad. Va in ast hukmi Xudo. Va agar Xudo mexost, az onon intiqom megirift, vale xost to sumoro ʙa jakdigar ʙijozmojad. Va onon, ki dar rohi Xudo kusta sudaand, amalhojasonro ʙotil namekunad
47_5: Ba zudi, ki hidojatason kunad va korhojasonro ʙa saloh ovarad
47_6: Va ʙa ʙihiste, ki ʙarojason vasf kardaast, doxilason sozad
47_7: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, agar Xudoro jori kuned, sumoro jori xohad kard va pojdori xohad ʙaxsid
47_8: Halokatu surʙaxti ʙod ʙar kofiron. Xudo amalhojasonro ʙotil kardaast
47_9: Zero onon cizero, ki Xudo nozil kardaast, noxus dorand. Xudo niz amalhojasonro noʙud kard
47_10: Ojo dar zamin sajr nakardaand, to ʙingarand, ki oqiʙati kasone, ki pes az onho ʙudaand, ci guna ʙudaast? Xudo halokason kard va kofiron niz oqiʙate oncunon xohand dost
47_11: In ʙa on saʙaʙ ast, ki Xudo jovari 'kasonest, ki imon ovardaand. Va kofironro hec jovare nest
47_12: Xudo kasonero, ki imon ovardaand va korhoi soista mekunand, ʙa ʙihisthoe, ki nahrho az on porist, doxil xohad kard. Va kofiron az in cahon ʙahramand mesavand va cun corpojon mexurand va cojgohason otas ast
47_13: Ci qarijahoe (dehahoe), ki mardumas az mardumi qarijai tu, ki az on ʙerunat kardand, xele purquvvattar ʙudand, ki halokason kardem va hec jorikunandae nadostand
47_14: Ojo kase, ki az coniʙi Parvardigoras daleli ravsane dorad, monandi kasonest, ki kirdori ʙadason dar nazarason orosta suda va az pai havohoi xud meravand
47_15: Vasfi ʙihiste, ki ʙa parhezgoron va'da doda suda, in ast, ki dar on nahrhoest az oʙhoe taƣjirnopazir va nahrhoe az sire, ki ta'mas digargun namesavad va nahrhoe az saroʙ, ki osomandagon az on lazzat meʙarand va nahrhoe az asali musaffo. Va dar on co har guna meva, ki ʙixohand, hast va niz ʙaxsoisi Parvardigorason. Ojo ʙihistijon monandi kasone hastand, ki dar otasi covidonaand va ononro az oʙe cuson meosomanand, cunon ki rudahojason tika-tika mesavad
47_16: Ba'ze ʙa tu gus medihand, to on goh ki az nazdi tu ʙerun ravand, az donismandon mepursand: «In ci suxanone ʙud, ki meguft?» Xudo ʙar dilhojason muhr nihodaast va az pai havohoi xud raftaand
47_17: Onon, ki hidojat joftaand, Xudo ʙa hidojatason meafzojad va parhezgorijason ato mekunad
47_18: Ojo tanho muntaziri onand, ki ʙa nogoh qijomat faro rasad? Har oina (Alʙatta) nisonahoi qijomat oskor sudaast. Va cun faro rasad, pand giriftanasonro ci foida
47_19: Pas ʙidon, ki hec xudoe cuz Olloh nest. Az gunohi xud va az gunohi mardonu zanoni mu'min ʙaxsois ʙixoh. Xudo medonad, ki ruz ʙa kuco meraved va saʙ ʙa kuco meoromed
47_20: Kasone, ki imon ovardaand, megujand: «Caro az coniʙi Xudo surae nozil namesavad?» Cun surae az muhqamot nozil savad, ki dar oja suxan az cang rafta ʙosad, ononro, ki dar dilason maraze hast, ʙini, ki cun kase, ki ʙehusii marg ʙar u ƣoliʙ suda, ʙa tu menigarand. Pas ʙarojasoja soistatar
47_21: farmonʙardorist va suxani neku guftan. Va cun tasmim ʙa cang girifta sud, agar ʙo Xudo sadoqat kunand, ʙarojason ʙehtar ast
47_22: Ojo agar ʙa hukumat rasided, mexohed dar zamin fasod kuned va pajvandi xesovandijatonro ʙiʙured
47_23: Inhoand, ki Xudo la'natason kardaast va gushojasonro karu casmonasonro kur soxtaast
47_24: Ojo dar Qur'on nameandesand jo ʙar dilhojason quflhost
47_25: Sajton amalhoi kasonero, ki ʙa'd az oskor sudani rohi hidojat murtad sudand (az din gastand) va ʙozgastand, dar nazarason ʙijorost va orzujason daroz kard
47_26: Va in ʙa on saʙaʙ ast, ki ʙa on guruh, ki ojoti Xudoro noxus medostand, meguftand: «Mo dar ʙa'ze az korho farmonʙardori sumo hastem. Va Xudo az rozason ogoh ast
47_27: Ci gunaand, on goh ki faristagon onhoro memironand va ʙar ru va pusthojason mezanand
47_28: In ʙa cazoi on ast, ki ʙa on ci Xudoro ʙa xasm meovarad, pajravi mekardaand va ʙa on ci xusnudas mesoxta, ʙadʙini dostaand. Xudo niz amalhojasonro noʙud kard
47_29: Ojo onon, ki dar dilason marazest, mepindorand, ki Xudo kinaero, ki dar dil pinhon dorand, oskor naxohad kard
47_30: Agar ʙixohem, onhoro ʙa tu menamojonem va tu onhoro ʙa simojason 'jo az sevai suxanason xohi sinoxt va Xudo az amalhojaton ogoh ast
47_31: Va sumoro meozmoem, to mucohidon va soʙironatonro ma'lum dorem va xaʙarhojatonro oskor kunem
47_32: Kasone, ki imon najovardand va az rohi Xudo rujgardon sudand va ʙo on ki rohi hidojat ʙarojason oskor suda ʙud, ʙo pajomʙar muxolifat namudand, hec zijone ʙa Xudo naxohand rasonid va Xudo amalhojasonro noʙud xohad kard
47_33: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, ʙa Xudo ito'at kuned va ʙa pajomʙar ito'at kuned va a'moli xudro ʙotil masozed
47_34: Xudo kasonero, ki kofir sudand va mardumro az rohi Xudo ʙozdostand va dar kufr murdand, hargiz naxohad ʙaxsond
47_35: Susti navarzed, to da'vat ʙa musoliha kuned. Sumo ʙartar hasted va Xudo ʙo sumost va az podoshojaton (mukofothojaton) naxohad kam kard
47_36: Zindagii incahoni faqat ʙozicavu ʙehudagist. Va agar imon ʙijovared va parhezgori kuned, Xudo mukofothojatonro xohad dod. Va az sumo molhojatonro nametalaʙad
47_37: Agar az sumo mole talaʙad va ʙardavom ham talaʙad, on goh ʙaxili mekuned va kinahoi pinhonatonro oskor mesozad
47_38: Ogoh ʙosed ki sumoro da'vat mekunand to dar rohi Xudo sadaqa kuned. Ba'ze az sumo ʙaxili mekunand, va har kas ki ʙaxili kunad, dar haqqi xud ʙaxili kardaast. Zero Xudo ʙehocat ast va sumo hocatmandoned. Va agar ruj ʙartoʙed, ʙa coi sumo mardume digar orad, ki hargiz misli sumo naʙosand
48_1: Mo ʙaroi tu piruzii namojonero hukm kardaem
48_2: To Xudo gunohi turo, on ci pes az in ʙuda va on ci pas az in ʙosad, ʙaroi tu ʙiʙaxsojad va ne'mati xudro ʙar tu komil kunad va turo ʙa rohi rost roh namojad
48_3: Va Xudo jorijat kunad, jori kardane piruzmandona
48_4: Ust, ki ʙar dilhoi mu'minon oromis firistod, to ʙar imonason pajvasta ʙijafzojad. Va az oni Xudost laskarhoi osmonhovu zamin va Xudo donovu hakim ast
48_5: Va to mardonu zanoni mu'minro ʙa ʙihisthoe doxil kunad, ki dar on nahrho corist va dar on co covidonand va gunohonasonro nest kunad. Va in dar nazdi Xudo komjoʙii ʙuzurgest
48_6: Va mardonu zanoni munofiq va mardonu zanoni musrikro, ki ʙar Xudo ʙadgumonand, 'azoʙ kunad. Bar onho ʙod musiʙati ʙad va Xudo ʙar onho xasm girift va la'natason kard va cahannamro ʙarojason omoda kardaast va cahannam cojgohi ʙadest
48_7: Az oni Xudost laskarhoi osmonhovu zamin va Xudo ƣoliʙu hakim ast
48_8: Turo guvohidihandavu muƶdadihanda va ʙimdihanda firistodaem
48_9: To ʙa Xudovu pajomʙaras imon ʙijovared va jorijas kunedu ʙuzurgas dored va Xudoro suʙhgohu somgoh tasʙeh gued
48_10: Onon, ki ʙo tu ʙaj'at (ahd) mekunand, cuz in nest, ki ʙo Xudo ʙaj'at mekunand. Dasti Xudo ʙoloi dasthojason ast. Va har ki ʙaj'atro ʙiskanad, ʙa zijoni xud sikastaast. Va har ki ʙa on ʙaj'at, ki ʙo Xudo ʙastaast, vafo kunad, uro muzde neku dihad
48_11: Az a'roʙi ʙodijanisin onon, ki az cang qafokasi kardand, ʙa tu xohand guft: «Doroivu kasoni mo moro az cang ʙozdostand, pas ʙaroi mo ʙaxsois ʙixoh». Ba zaʙon cize megujad, ki dar dilason nest. Bigu: «Agar Xudo ʙarojaton zijone ʙixohad jo sude ʙixohad, ci kase metavonad dar ʙaroʙari Xudo onro digargun kunad?» Balki Ust, ki ʙa korhojaton ogoh ast
48_12: Jo mepindosted, ki pajomʙar va mu'minon hargiz nazdi kasonasen ʙoz naxohand gast va dil ʙa in xus karda ʙuded. Pindori ʙade dostaed va mardume sazovori halokat ʙudaed
48_13: Va har kas ʙa Xudovu pajomʙaras imon najovardaast, ʙidonad, ki ʙaroi kofiron otase suzon omoda kardaem
48_14: Az oni Xudost farmonravoii osmonhovu zamin. Har kiro ʙixohad, meʙaxsad va har kiro ʙixohad, azoʙ mekunad va Xudo ʙaxsojandavu mehruʙon ast
48_15: Cun ʙaroi giriftani ƣanimatho ʙa roh ʙijafted, onon, ki az cang taxalluf (qafokasi) namudaand, xohand guft: «Bigzored, to mo ham az pai sumo ʙijoem! Mexohand suxani Xudoro digargun kunand. Bigu: '«Sumo hargiz az pai mo naxohed omad. Xudo az pes cunin guftaast». Sipas xohand guft: «Balki ʙar mo hasad meʙared?» Na, inho cuz andake namefahmand
48_16: Ba a'roʙi ʙodijanisin, ki az cang taxalluf namudaand, ʙigu: «Ba zudi ʙaroi cang ʙa mardume saxt nerumand da'vat karda mesaved, ki ʙo onho ʙicanged jo musalmon savand. Agar ito'at kuned, Xudojaton muzde neku xohad dod va agar, hamcunon ki pes az in sar ʙartoftaed, sar ʙartoʙed, sumoro ʙa azoʙe dardovar azoʙ mekunad»
48_17: Bar kur harace (gunohe) nest va ʙar lang xarace nest va ʙar ʙemor xarace nest. Va har ki ʙa Xudovu pajomʙaras ito'at kunad, uro ʙa ʙihisthoe doxil mekunad, ki dar on nahrho ravon ast. Va har ki sar ʙartoʙad, ʙa azoʙe dardovaras azoʙ mekunad
48_18: Xudo az mu'minon, on hangom ki dar zeri daraxt ʙo tu ʙaj'at kardand, xusnud gast va donist, ki dar dilason ci meguzarad. Pas oromis ʙar onho nozil kard va ʙa fathe (ƣalaʙae) nazdik mukofotason dod
48_19: va ʙa ƣanimathoi ʙisjor, ki ʙa dast meovarand. Va Xudo ƣoliʙu hakim ast
48_20: Xudo ʙa sumo va'dai ƣanimathoi ʙisjor dodaast, ki ʙa dast meovared va in ƣanimatro zudtar ato kard va sumoro az oseʙi mardumon amon ʙaxsid, to ʙaroi mu'minon iʙrate ʙosad va ʙa rohi rost hidojatason kunad
48_21: Va ƣanimathoi digare, ki hanuz ʙa onho dast najoftaed. Har oina (Alʙatta) Xudo ʙa on (ʙo ilmas) ihota dorad va U ʙa har kore tavonost
48_22: Va agar kofiron ʙo sumo ʙa cang ʙarxezand, pust gardonda ʙigrezand va digar hec dustu jorigare namejoʙand
48_23: In sunnati Xudost, ki az pes cunin ʙudaast va tu dar sunnati Xudo digarguni 'naxohi joft
48_24: Ust, ki cun dar ʙatni (moʙajni) Makka ʙar onho ƣoliʙijataton dod, dasti onhoro az sumo va dasti sumoro az onho ʙozdost. Va Xudo ʙa korhoe, ki mekarded, ogohu ʙino ʙud
48_25: Inho hamonhojand, ki kofir sudand va sumoro az mascidulharom ʙozdostand va naguzostand, ki qurʙoni ʙa qurʙongohas ʙirasad. Agar mardoni musalmonu zanoni musalmone, ki onhoro namesinosed, dar mijoni onho naʙudand va ʙimi on naʙud, ki onhoro zeri poj kuned va nodonista gunoh sodir kuned, Xudo dasti sumoro az onho ʙoznamedost. Va Xudo har kiro ʙixohad, somili rahmati Xud gardonad. Agar az jakdigar cudo meʙudand, kofironasonro ʙa azoʙe dardovar azoʙ mekardem
48_26: On goh ki kofiron tasmim giriftand, dar dili xud ta'assuʙro, ta'assuʙi cohili, Xudo niz oromisi Xudro ʙar dili pajomʙaras va mu'minon furud ovard va ʙa taqvo lozimason kard, ki inho ʙa taqvo sazovortaru soistatar ʙudand va Xudo ʙar har cize donost
48_27: Xudo xoʙi pajomʙarasro rost ʙarovard, ki gufta ʙud: «Agar Xudo ʙixohad, emin guruhe sartarosida va guruhe muj kutoh karda ʙe hec tars ʙa mascidulharom doxil mesaved. U cizhoe medonist, ki sumo namedonisted. Va cuz on dar hamin nazdiki fathe nasiʙi sumo karda ʙud
48_28: Ust, ki pajomʙarasro ʙa hidojat va dini haq firistod, to on dinro ʙar hamai dinho ƣoliʙ gardonad. Va Xudo ʙaroi sohidi didan kofist
48_29: Muhammad — pajomʙari Xudo va kasone, ki ʙo u hastand, ʙar kofiron saxtgirand va ʙo jakdigar mehruʙon. Ononro ʙini, ki ruqu' mekunand, ʙa sacda meojand va talaʙkunandai fazlu xusnudii Xudo hastand. Nisonason asari sacdaest, ki ʙar cehrai onhost. In ast vasfason dar Tavrot va dar Incil, misli ziroate hastand, ki gijoh ʙarorad va on cavona mahkam savad va ʙar pohoi xud ʙiistad va dehqononro ʙa hajrat vodorad, to on co ki kofironro ʙa xasm ovarad. Xudo az mijoni onho kasonero, ki imon ovardaand, va korhoi soista kardaand, ʙaxsois va mukofote ʙuzurg va'da dodaast
49_1: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, ʙar Xudovu pajomʙari U pesdasti makuned va az Xudo ʙitarsed, zero Xudo sunavovu donost
49_2: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, sadoi xudro az sadoi pajomʙar ʙalandtar nakuned va hamcunon, ki ʙo jakdigar ʙaland suxan megued, ʙo u ʙa ovozi ʙaland suxan nagued, ki amalhojaton nociz savad va sumo ogoh nasaved
49_3: Kasone, ki dar nazdi pajomʙari Xudo sadojasonro poin meovarand, hamonhojand, ki Xudo dilhojasonro ʙa takvo ozmuda ast. Onhoro ʙaxsoisu muzdi ʙisjor ast
49_4: Onhoe, ki az on sui hucraho turo nido medihand, ʙestar ʙexiradonand
49_5: Agar saʙr, mekardand, to tu xud ʙerun meomadi va nazdi onho merafti, ʙarojason ʙehtar meʙud va Xudo ʙaxsojandai mehruʙon ast
49_6: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, agar fosiqe ʙarojaton xaʙare ovard, tahqiq kuned, maʙod az rui nodoni ʙa mardume oseʙ (ranc) ʙirasoned, on goh, az kore, ki kardaed, pusajmon saved
49_7: Va ʙidoned, ki pajomʙari Xudo dar mijoni sumost. Agar dar ʙisjore az korho az sumo farmon ʙiʙarad, ʙa ranc meafted. Vale Xudo imonro mahʙuʙi sumo soxt va onro dar dilaton ʙiorost va kufru fisqu nofarmoniro dar nazaraton ʙad gardonid. Inho xud rohjoftagonand
49_8: Baxsisu ne'matest az coniʙi Xudo va Xudo donovu hakim ast
49_9: Va agar du guruh az mu'minon ʙo jakdigar ʙa cang ʙarxostand, mijonason osti andozed. Va agar jak guruh ʙar digare dast darozi kard, ʙo on ki dast darozi kardaast, ʙicanged, to ʙa farmoni Xudo ʙozgardad. Pas agar ʙozgast, mijonason sulhe odilona ʙarqaror kuned va adolat kuned, ki Xudo odilonro dust dorad
49_10: Har oina (Alʙatta) mu'minon ʙarodaronand. Mijoni ʙarodaronaton osti andozed va az Xudo ʙitarsed, sojad, ki ʙar sumo rahmat orad
49_11: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, maʙod, ki guruhe az mardon guruhi digarro masxara kunad, sojad on masxarasudagon ʙehtar az onho ʙosand. Va maʙod, ki guruhe az zanon guruhi digarro masxara kunad, sojad on masxarasudagon ʙehtar az onho ʙosand. Va az ham ajʙcuj makuned va jakdigarro ʙa laqaʙhoi zist maxoned. Bad ast unvoni fisq pas az imon ovardan. Va kasone, ki tavʙa namekunand, xud sitamkoronand
49_12: Ej kasone, ki imon ovardaed, az ʙisjore az gumonho ʙiparhezed. Zero ʙa'ze az gumonho dar haddi gunoh ast. Va dar korhoi pinhonii jakdigar cosusi makuned. Va az jakdigar ƣajʙat makuned. Ojo hec jak az sumo dust dorad, ki gusti ʙarodari murdai xudro ʙixurad? Pas onro noxus xohed dost. Va az Xudo ʙitarsed, zero Xudo tavʙapaziru mehruʙon ast
49_13: Ej mardum, mo sumoro az jak mardu jak zan ʙijofaridem. Va sumoro camo'atho va qaʙilaho kardem, to jakdigarro ʙisinosed. Alʙatta giromitarini sumo nazdi Xudo parhezgortarini sumost. Xudo donovu kordon ast
49_14: A'roʙi ʙodijanisin guftand: «Imon ovardem!» Bigu: «Imon najova. rdaed. Bigued, ki taslim sudaem va hanuz imon dar dilhojaton doxil nasudaast. Va agar Xudovu pajomʙarasro ito'at kuned, az savoʙi amalhoi sumo kam karda namesavad, zero Xudo ʙaxsojandavu mehruʙon ast»
49_15: Muʹminon kasone hastand, ki ʙa Xudovu pajomʙari U imon ovardaand va digar sak nakardaand va ʙo molu coni xud dar rohi Xudo cihod kardaand. Inho rostgujonand
49_16: Bigu: «Ojo mexohed Xudoro az dindorii xud ogoh kuned? Hol on ki Xudo az har ci dar osmonhovu har ci dar zamin ast, ogoh ast va U ʙa har cize olim ast!»
49_17: Az in ki islom ovardaand, ʙar tu minnat mekunand. Bigu: «Ba xotiri islomaton ʙar man minnat mekuned, ʙalki Xudo ʙa on saʙaʙ, ki sumoro ʙa imon roh namudaast, ʙar sumo minnat menihad, agar rost megued!»
49_18: Alʙatta Xudo nihoni osmonhovu zaminro medonad va ʙa har kore, ki mekuned, ʙinost
50_1: Qof. Qasam ʙa in Qur'oni arcmand
50_2: Ki dar taaccuʙ sudand, az in ki az mijoni xudason ʙimdihandae sujason omad, va kofiron guftand: «In cize aciʙ ast
50_3: Ojo zamone, ki murdemu xok sudem, digar ʙor zinda mesavem? In ʙozgaste muxol (nomumkin) ast!»
50_4: Mo medonem, ki xok ci guna az (casadhoi) onho kam mekunad. Va kitoʙe, ki hama ciz dar on nigahdori suda, nazdi Most
50_5: Ore, onho suxani rostero, ki ʙar onho omada ʙud, duruƣ sumurdand. Pas dar kore surida aftodand
50_6: Ojo ʙa in osmon ʙar ʙoloi sarason nazar namekunasd, ki ci guna onro ʙino kardaem va orostaem va hec sikofe dar on nest
50_7: Va zaminro gusturdem va dar on kuhhoi ʙaland afkandem va az har guna naʙototi xusmanzar dar on rujonidem
50_8: Binise va pandest ʙaroi har ʙandae, ki ʙa Xudo ʙozgardad
50_9: Va az osmoi oʙe purʙarakat firistodem va ʙo on ʙoƣhovu donahoi daravsudani rujonidem
50_10: va naxlhoi ʙaland ʙo xusahoi ʙarham cida
50_11: to rizqi ʙaidagon ʙosad va ʙo on oʙ sarzamini murdaro zinda kardem. Baromadan az gur niz cunin ast
50_12: Pes az onho qavmi Nuh va ashoʙi Ras va Samud takziʙ karda (duruƣ ʙarovarda) ʙudand
50_13: va qavmi Odu Fir'avn va qavmi Lut
50_14: va ashoʙi Ajka va qavmi Tuʙʙa' hama pajomʙaronro duruƣ sumurdand va sazovori va'dai azoʙi Man sudand
50_15: Ojo az ofarinisi naxustin ociz suda ʙudem? Na onho dar ofarinisi toza dar sakkand
50_16: Mo odamiro ofaridaem va az vasvasahoi nafsi u ogoh hastem, zero az ragi gardanas ʙa u nazdiktarem
50_17: Hangome ki on du faristai farogiranda dar coniʙi rostu coniʙi capi u nisastaand, har cizro faro megirand
50_18: Har kalome ki megujad, alʙatta dar kanori u noziru navisandae hozir ast
50_19: Ba rosti, ki ʙehusii marg faro merasad. In ast on ci az on megurexti
50_20: Va dar sur damida mesavad, In ast, ruzi va'dahoi azoʙ
50_21: Har kase meojad va ʙo u kasest, ki meronadas va kasest, ki ʙarojas sohidi medihad
50_22: Tu az in ƣofil ʙudi. Mo parda az ʙaroʙarat ʙardostem va imruz casmonat tezʙin sudaast
50_23: Faristai (muvakkali) u gujad: «In ast on ci man omoda kardaam»
50_24: Har nosukri sarkasro ʙa cahannam ʙijandozed
50_25: on ki az ʙaxsis ʙaxili kard va tacovuzkor ʙud va sak meovard
50_26: on ki ʙo Xudoi jak to xudoi digare qaror dod. Pas ʙa azoʙi saxtas ʙipartoed
50_27: Hamnisini u gujad: «Ej Parvardigori mo, man uro ʙa sarkasi vodor nakardam, ʙalki u xud, saxt dar gumrohi ʙud»
50_28: Megujad: «Nazdi Man mucodala nakuned. Man pes az in ʙo sumo suxan az azoʙ gufta ʙudam
50_29: Va'dai Man digargun namesavad va Man ʙa ʙandagon zulm namekunam»
50_30: Ruze, ki cahannamro meguem: «Ojo pur sudai?» Megujad: «Ojo hec zijodati hast?»
50_31: Va ʙihistro ʙaroi parhezgoron nazdik ʙijovarand, to az on dur naʙosand
50_32: In hamon cizest, ki ʙa har tavʙakunasdai parhezgore va'daas doda ʙudand
50_33: Onhoero, ki dar nihon az Xudoi rahmon metarsand va ʙo dile tavʙakor omadaand
50_34: Gujand: «Dar amon az har azoʙe ʙa ʙihist doxil saved. In ruz ruzi covidonist»
50_35: Dar on co har ci ʙixohand, hast va ʙestar az on nazdi Mo hast
50_36: Pes az onho ci ʙisjor mardumero, ki ʙoquvvattar ʙudand va dar sahrho sajru custucu mekardand, ʙa halokat ovardaem. Ojo rohi gureze hast
50_37: Dar in suxan ʙaroi sohiʙdilon jo onon, ki ʙo huzur gus meandozand, andarzest (pandest)
50_38: Mo osmonhovu zamin, va on ciro mijoni onhost, dar sas ruz ofaridem va hec xastagi ʙa Mo narasid
50_39: Dar ʙaroʙari on ci megujand, pojdori kun va dar sitoisi Parvardigorat pes az ʙaromadani oftoʙ va pes az faromadani on tasʙeh guj
50_40: Va niz dar porae az saʙ va ʙa'd az har sacda uro tasʙeh guj
50_41: Va on goh ki munodi (nidokunanda, Isrofil) az makone nazdik nido medihad, gus faro dor
50_42: Ruze, ki on ovozi saxtro ʙa haq mesunavand, on ruz ruzi ʙerun sudan az gur ast
50_43: Mo zinda mekunem va memironem va ʙozgast nazdi Most
50_44: Ruze, ki zamin ʙiskofad va onho ʙa sitoʙ ʙerun ojand va in cam'ovari ʙaroi Mo oson ast
50_45: Mo ʙa on ci megujand, donotarem va tu ʙa onho zur namegui. Pas har kiro az va'dai azoʙi Man metarsad, ʙa Qur'on pand deh
51_1: Savgand ʙa ʙodhoe, ki xok parokanda mekunand
51_3: savgand ʙa kistihoe, ki ʙa osoni ravonand
51_4: va savgand ʙa faristagone, ki taqsimkunandai korhojand
51_5: ki on ci sumoro va'da medihand, rost ast
51_7: Va savgand ʙa osmon, ki ʙa sitoragon orosta ast
51_8: ki sumo (dar xususi pajƣamʙar) suxani gunogun megued
51_9: Az haq ʙozgardonida savad, on ki ʙozgardonidanasro xostaand
51_11: onon ki ʙa ƣaflat dar cahl furu raftaand
51_13: Ruzest, ki ʙar otas azoʙason mekunand
51_14: «Azoʙi xudro ʙicased! In ast on cize, ki ʙa sitoʙ metalaʙided!»
51_15: Parhezgoron dar ʙoƣhovu kanori casmasoron ʙosand
51_16: On ciro Xudo ʙa onho dodaast, giriftaand. Zero pes az on nekukor ʙudand
51_18: va ʙa hangomi sahar istiƣfor (tavʙa) mekardand
51_19: va dar molhojason ʙaroi pursandavu mahrum xaqqe ʙud
51_20: Va dar zamin ʙaroi axli jaqin iʙrathoest
51_21: va niz dar vucudi xudaton. Ojo nameʙined
51_22: Va rizqi sumo va har ci ʙa sumo va'da suda, dar osmon ast
51_23: Pas savgand ʙa Parvardigori osmonahovu zamin, ki in suxan oncunon ki suxan megujand, haq va rost ast
51_24: Ojo dostoni mehmononi giromii Iʙrohim ʙa tu rasidaast
51_25: On goh ki nazdi u omadandu guftand: «Salom!» Guft: «Salom! Sumo mardumi nosinoxtaed!»
51_26: Dar nihon va sitoʙon nazdi kasoni xud raft va gusolai farʙehe ovard
51_27: Ta'omro ʙa nazdason guzostu guft: «Caro namexured?»
51_28: Va az onho ʙimnok sud. Guftand: «Matars!» Va uro ʙa farzande dono xusxaʙar dodand
51_29: Va zanas farjodzanon omad va ʙar ruj zadu guft: Man pirazane nozojam»
51_30: Guftand: «Parvardigori tu incunin guftaast. Va u hakimu donost!»
51_31: Guft: «Ej rasulon, ʙa ci kor omadaed?»
51_33: to tikkahoi sanghoi gili ʙar sarason ʙiʙorem
51_34: ki ʙar on sangho az coniʙi Parvardigorat ʙaroi az had, guzastaho nison guzostaand»
51_35: Pas hamai kasonero, ki imon ovarda ʙudand, ʙerun ʙurdem
51_36: Va dar on sahr ƣajri jak xona va farmonʙardoron najoftem
51_37: Va dar on sarzamin ʙaroi kasone, ki az azoʙi dardovar metarsand, nisone ʙoqi guzostem
51_38: Va iʙratest dar Muso, on goh ki uro ʙo huccate oskor nazdi Fir'avn firistodem
51_39: Va U ʙo hamai quvvaas ruj gardondu guft: «Codugarest jo devonae!»
51_40: U va laskarhojasro giriftem va ʙa darjo partoftem. Va u mustavciʙi (sazovori) malomat ʙud
51_41: Va niz iʙratest dar qavmi Od, on goh, ki ʙodi aqimro ʙar onho firistodem
51_42: Bar har cize vazid, faqat ustuxone pusidaas ʙar coj guzost
51_43: Va niz iʙratest dar qavmi Samud, on goh ki ʙa onho gufta sud: «To zamone cand ʙarxurdor saved»
51_44: Onon az farmoni Parvardigorason sar ʙozzadand va hamcunon ki menigaristand, ra'di tunde furu giriftason
51_45: Istodan natavonistand va tavoni intiqom nadostand
51_46: Va az pes qavmi Nuhro halok kardem, ki qavme nofarmon ʙudand
51_47: Va osmonro ʙa quvvat ʙarafrostem va haqqo, ki Mo tavonoem
51_48: Va zaminro gusturdem va ci neku gustarandagonem
51_49: Va az har ciz cufte ʙijofaridaem, sojad, ki iʙrat gired
51_50: Pas ʙa sui Xudovand ʙigrezed. Man sumoro az coniʙi U ʙimdihandae oskoram
51_51: Va ʙo Xudoi jakto xudoi digaroro maparasted. Man sumoro az coniʙi U ʙimdihandae oskoram

56_47: va meguftand: «Ojo zamone, ki mo murdemu xoku ustuxon sudem, ʙoz ham moro zinda mekunand
56_49: Bigu: «Hamaro, onon, ki az in pes ʙudand va onho, ki az pajason omada ʙudand
56_50: hama dar va'dagohi on ruzi mu'ajjan xohand ʙud
56_51: On goh sumo, ej gumrohoni duruƣʙaroranda
56_53: va sikamhoi xudro az on pur xohed kard
56_54: va ʙar ʙoloi on oʙi cuson xohed nusid
56_55: cunon menused, ki suturi tasn, a oʙ menusad
56_56: In ast mehmondoriason dar ruzi cazo
56_57: Mo sumoro ofaridaem, pas caro tasdiq namekuned
56_58: Ojo on maniro, ki merezed, didaed
56_59: Ojo sumo uro meofarined jo Mo ofarinandaem
56_60: Mo margro ʙar sumo, muajjan soxtem va notavon az on nestom, ki
56_61: ʙa coi sumo qavme monandi sumo ʙijovarem va sumoro ʙa surate, ki az on ʙexaʙared, az nav ʙijofarinem
56_62: Sumo aj ofarinisi naxust ogohed, caro ʙa jodas najovared
56_64: Ojo sumo merujonedas jo Mo rujonandaem
56_65: Agar mexostem, xosokas mesoxtem, to dar hajrat ʙimoned
56_69: Ojo sumo onro az aʙr furud meored jo Mo furud orandagonem
56_70: Agar mexostem onro talx megardonidem. Pas caro sukr namegued
56_71: Ojo on otasro, ki meafruzed didaed
56_72: Ojo daraxtasro sumo ofaridaed jo Mo ofarinandaem
56_73: Mo onro xusdore (az duzax) va ʙaroi musofironi rohnavard mato'e soxtem
56_74: Ba nomi Parvardigori ʙuzurgi xud tasʙeh guj
56_76: Va in savgandest, — agar ʙidoned, — ʙuzurg
56_79: ki cuz pokon dast ʙar on nazanand
56_80: Nozilsuda az coniʙi Parvardigori cahonijon ast
56_82: Va nasiʙi xudro dar duruƣ hisoʙidani on qaror medihed
56_83: Pas caro on goh ki con ʙa gulu rasad
56_84: va sumo dar in hangom menigared
56_85: Mo az sumo ʙa u nazdiktarem, vale sumo nameʙined
56_87: agar rost megued, ʙozas gardoned! (ruhro ʙar casad)
56_89: ʙaroi ust osoisu ruzi va ʙihisti purne'mat
